prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all C++ source files in envoyproxy/envoy that implement the ADS (Aggregated Discovery Service) gRPC server: the gRPC stream handler, the resource subscription tracking, the delta-xDS state machine, and the ACK/NACK processing.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the envoy-service-mesh fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all C++ source files in envoyproxy/envoy that implement the ADS (Aggregated Discovery Service) gRPC server: the gRPC stream handler, the resource subscription tracking, the delta-xDS state machine, and the ACK/NACK processing.
